steps.t: The next mark on the map indicates a location somewhere in Elderslade. You should travel north along the river to search for the next location on the …
The old cairn can be found in Elderslade. You should examine the cairn.
Fróthi can be found following Fram's map in Elderslade. You should talk to Fróthi.
